## Checklist

- [ ] `node scripts/check.mjs` passes (inline-script syntax + local links)
- [ ] Verified in a real browser (not just headless)
- [ ] No build step / framework / `node_modules` introduced
- [ ] Honors `prefers-reduced-motion`; keyboard actions have a tappable alternative
- [ ] No personal data / secrets added (see the do-not-publish rule in SKILL.md)
